entries.material: Supply & fixing of Thermal insulation for supply air duct using 13 mm thick class " O " Closed cell nitrile rubber based elastomeric insulation with the density of 40 - 55 kg/m³. The insulation manafactured as per BS 476 Part 7test & which should also meet UL94 supplementary materials for air distribution system which should not absorbs less 0.2% water by volume and should not emit objectionable odors and should have thermal conductivity of 0.033W/m.k @ 0deg C and water vapor permeance of 0.10. Joints should be sealed with 50 mm wide 3 mm thick self adhesive tape (Black Cotton Tape not acceptable). Adhesive shall be used additionally with VOC level not exceeding 50 grms / Litre.

Supply & fixing of Thermal insulation for Exposed Duct using 25 mm thick class " O " Closed cell nitrile rubber with UV protected and weather proof based elastomeric insulation with the density of 40 - 55 kg/m³. The insulation manafactured as per BS 476 Part 7test & which should also meet UL94 supplementary materials for air distribution system which should not absorbs less 0.2% water by volume and should not emit objectionable odors and should have thermal conductivity of 0.033W/m.k @ 0deg C. and water vapor permeance of 0.10. Joints should be sealed with 50 mm wide 3 mm thick self adhesive tape (Black Cotton Tape not acceptable). Adhesive shall be used additionally with VOC level not exceeding 50 grms / Litre. Insulation shall be with necessary UV protection and weather protection for longer life.

Supply and installation of Wall Acoustic insulation of AHU Room using 35 mm thick class 1 rating Open cell nitrile rubber elastomeric insulation with density of 140 - 180 kg with requred accessories to complete the works.
